ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PCN-03-284867 Conservatorship of Chris P. Enevold Jr.

Appearances: Rowena Navia for Debra Dolch (Petitioner/Conservator/Successor Trustee).

Ms. Navia stated that the Conservator was in the process of spending down in both the Conservatorship Estate and the Trust for the purpose of qualifying the Conservatee for medical. In addition, she stated that the bond has been reduced, that there would be a retroactive refund of the premium paid, and explained the difficulties and issues they dealt with and the extent of services provided. The Court approved the accountings on both matters (subject to review of the orders).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1242-1244 15th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia (Counsel for Deborah Dolch, Trustee); Karen Mitchell (Counsel for Chris Enevold, Objector); Robert Begley.

After announcing the sale of the property and receiving no overbids, the Court confirmed the sale of the real property in the amount of $1,050,000.00 and set additional bond in the amount of $525,000, signing the Order for same (as revised) in open court.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.

Petition For Authority To Sell Trust Real Property And For Authority To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement With Marco Martinelli, Coldwell Banker
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Rowena Navia appearing for and with petitioner Debra Dolch. Karen Mitchell appearing for Chris Enevold, beneficiary and conservatee. The conservatee has filed objections. He wants to return home. Counsel for Margaret Enevold is in court. He is not making an appearance. Ms. Dolch reports to the court her efforts to get a loan without success. Court is approving the petition. Order signed. Estate planning issues raise by Ms. Navia. She can file a substituted judgment petition to resolve the question. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.
